seoTitle: Ogilvie vs Old Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ogilvie and Old Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ogilvie vs Old Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ogilvie and Old Plains.
heading: Ogilvie vs Old Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ogilvie, Western Australia and Old Plains, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ogilvie has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Old Plains (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ogilvie or Old Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ogilvie has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Old Plains scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ogilvie scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Old Plains scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ogilvie or Old Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ogilvie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
